name: artifi-credit-intelligence
description: Credit intelligence on a borrower's live general ledger. Reads the transactional source of truth (not lagging self-reported PDFs) and produces a real credit memo: DSCR, leverage, working-capital cycle, concentration risk, early-warning signals, with citations back to the underlying transactions. Designed for banks, alternative lenders, and PE credit teams monitoring portfolio borrowers in real time.
